name: Metaplay
description: Unity-first live-service game backend platform with LiveOps tooling and webshop/DTC integrations for mobile game monetization.

seo.title: Metaplay — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: Metaplay: Unity-first live-service game backend platform with LiveOps tooling and webshop/DTC integrations for mobile game monetization.

when_to_use: Unity game backend with LiveOps, CMS, and DTC webshop integration
Out-of-app store and web checkout for mobile game currency bundles
Live-service event and config management for Unity mobile games
Unified game backend replacing custom server with LiveOps tooling

pros: Unity-first live-service backend with LiveOps tooling
Webshop and DTC integrations for margin capture
Scales to real MMO-style live games
Strong tooling for events and content updates
cons: Heavy platform commitment, not a drop-in SDK
Pricing and rev-share require direct sales
Unity focus limits Unreal and custom-engine shops
review.verdict: Serious live-service backend for Unity game studios, but it's a platform bet, not a lightweight integration.
review.best_for: Unity studios running live-service mobile games with LiveOps needs.
review.not_for: Unreal or custom-engine studios, or indie single-player games.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
